title: Define review data contract from accepted ADR
requirements: Use accepted ADR-0017 decisions before model changes.
Keep MemoryIngestionIssue as the primary review queue for MVP.
Define ReviewQueueItem as a selector-level read-only projection, not as a Django model.
Add immutable MemoryReviewAction model for review decisions and index actions.
Add assignment and resolution fields to MemoryIngestionIssue only if they are needed for filtering and workflow.
Add index health IssueKind values only when diagnostics create persistent issues.
Do not add a persistent MemoryReviewCase in this slice.
Do not store full extracted text, raw secrets, raw PII or raw query.
